description: Complete rewrite of index.html to support multi-format downloads (video, MP3, images) from all supported social media platforms (TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, Pinterest, Threads, Shopee) with no-watermark option. Also create worker.js with the Cloudflare Worker code that properly proxies requests to Cobalt API with format/quality parameters.
steps: Rewrite index.html with enhanced UI that includes: (1) URL input field, (2) Download format selector (Video/MP3 Audio/Images), (3) Video quality selector (highest/1080p/720p/480p/360p), (4) No-watermark toggle (enabled by default), (5) Platform support display showing all 7 platforms: TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, Pinterest, Threads, Shopee

Add a results/download section in the UI that can display: (1) Single download button for direct downloads, (2) Multiple download options when picker response is returned (e.g., Instagram carousel, multiple quality options), (3) Separate video/audio/image download buttons when applicable

Implement the JavaScript download logic that: (1) Detects platform from URL (tiktok.com, instagram.com, facebook.com, youtube.com, pinterest.com, threads.net, shopee.co.id/shopee.com), (2) Sends POST to Worker with parameters: {url, downloadMode, videoQuality, filenameStyle, tiktokFullAudio, tiktokH265, disableMetadata}, (3) downloadMode maps to user selection: 'auto' for video, 'audio' for MP3, 'mute' for video without audio, (4) Handles response types: 'redirect' (direct URL), 'tunnel' (stream URL), 'picker' (multiple items)

Handle picker responses properly: when Cobalt returns picker array (Instagram carousels, TikTok slideshows), display all items as individual download buttons with thumbnails if available. Each picker item has {type, url, thumb} where type can be 'video' or 'photo'

Style the page with modern dark theme matching current design (emerald/tosca gradient theme), make it fully responsive for mobile, add loading states and error handling with user-friendly Indonesian language messages

Create worker.js file containing Cloudflare Worker code that: (1) Handles CORS headers for cross-origin requests, (2) Accepts POST with {url, downloadMode, videoQuality, filenameStyle, tiktokFullAudio, tiktokH265, disableMetadata}, (3) Forwards request to Cobalt API (https://api.cobalt.tools/) with proper headers including Accept: application/json and Content-Type: application/json, (4) Returns Cobalt response to frontend, (5) Handles errors gracefully
acceptance_criteria: index.html contains a working UI with URL input, format selector (Video/MP3/Images), quality selector, and no-watermark toggle
All 7 platforms are listed in the UI: TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, Pinterest, Threads, Shopee
JavaScript correctly builds request body with downloadMode based on user selection (auto/audio/mute)
Picker responses are handled to show multiple download options (not just first item)
worker.js contains complete Cloudflare Worker code with CORS handling and Cobalt API proxy logic
UI is responsive and uses the existing dark emerald/tosca theme
No-watermark is the default behavior (Cobalt API removes watermarks by default when no specific parameter blocks it)
Error messages are displayed in Indonesian language
verification: Verify index.html is valid HTML by checking structure
Verify worker.js contains addEventListener('fetch') or export default with fetch handler
Verify the download function sends correct parameters to the worker
Verify picker handling logic displays multiple items
Verify all 7 platforms are mentioned in the UI
